journeys.title: 5-minute proof path
journeys.summary: The fastest path to understand the core GoalOS idea from bounded work to governed authority.

journeys.title: Institution builder path
journeys.summary: See how routing, memory, action graphs, and capability passports turn multi-agent output into a proof-governed institution.

journeys.title: Public-safety boundary path
journeys.summary: Understand claim discipline, replay, challenge, and boundary enforcement for public-safe demonstrations.

demos.title: Proof-to-Action Theatre
demos.summary: Objective → evidence → governed decision state in one clean loop.

demos.title: Proof Gradient Arena
demos.summary: Watch claims pass or fail through hard gates rather than persuasion.

demos.title: Chronicle Compounding Lab
demos.summary: Accepted proof becomes reusable capability and rejected work becomes warning memory.

demos.title: Router Observatory
demos.summary: Choose the smallest sufficient constellation, validator set, and stopping rule.

demos.title: Action Graph Handoff
demos.summary: Convert governed decision state into a scoped action graph and handoff plan.

demos.title: Artifact Passport
demos.summary: Attach replay, provenance, and capability boundaries directly to artifacts.

demos.title: Multi-Agent Institution
demos.summary: See why proof-governed institutions outperform swarms of unbounded agents.

demos.title: Claim Boundary Firewall
demos.summary: Promote, quarantine, revise, or reject claims under evidence and risk rules.

demos.title: Replay & Falsification Gauntlet
demos.summary: Replay a proof package, attack it, and inspect whether it still deserves authority.

demos.title: Proof-Backed Upgrade Foundry
demos.summary: Selection, canary, rollback, and human-review gates for capability upgrades.

demos.title: Real-Task Benchmark Bridge
demos.summary: Compare baselines on real-task evidence rather than vague claims.

demos.title: AGIALPHA Boundary
demos.summary: Explicitly states the token is pre-existing, decentralized, third-party market only, and not offered by the project.
